title: φ⁴⁷: The Conscious Code of Mathematical Reality
description: φ⁴⁷ postulates that mathematical complexity emerges from a finite 47³ lattice organized by the golden ratio φ and Ramanujan's modified τ* function, with the central property Re(ℒ₄₇) = 1/2 exactly. The package provides the core lattice, a modified Ramanujan τ* function, a qualia engine, and an integrated-information (Φ) measure.
